dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4410 IS: To amend the Mineral Leasing Act to provide for the payment of bonus payments of certain coal leases issued under that Act.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Barrasso (for himself, Ms. Lummis, and Mr. Lee) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend the Mineral Leasing Act to provide for the payment of bonus payments of certain coal leases issued under that Act.

section.header: Bonus payments for certain coal leases issued under Mineral Leasing Act
section.text: Section 2(a) of the Mineral Leasing Act (30 U.S.C. 201(a)) is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: The bonus payments for a lease issued under this subsection under a system of deferred bonus payment shall be payable in 10 equal annual installments, the first of which shall be submitted with the bid for such lease.
